problem_statement: Browser inspection can produce useful operator evidence, but without a typed boundary it can drift into navigation, click, submit, cookie/session, secret, connector, or publication authority.
success_criteria: BrowserObservationReceipt validates against a public JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
BrowserObservationReceipt binds source URL hash, DOM digest ref, screenshot digest ref, consent scope, capture policy ref, evidence classification ref, and UAO ref

BrowserObservationReceipt blocks navigation, click, form submit, keystroke injection, cookie/session reads, secret capture, external writes, connector calls, publication, terminal closure, and success claims
BrowserObservationReceipt rejects raw URL storage, raw DOM storage, raw screenshot storage, raw secret storage, digest drift, missing evidence refs, receipt ref drift, and summary count drift
BrowserObservationReceipt is covered by a focused validator, root test, protocol manifest entry, proof coverage matrix entry, and CI hook
constraints: source URL remains hash-only in the Foundation example
DOM, screenshot, and title evidence remain digest refs
raw URL, raw DOM, raw screenshot, and raw secret storage remain false
LifeMeaningJudgment and UAO refs remain explicit
